description: A clear plastic jar with a red lid, labeled 'PC BLUE MENU Crunchy Peanut Butter'. The label has images of peanuts and text in English and French. The peanut butter is a light brown color.
A large white tub with a dark gray lid, labeled 'ÔTKO PRO Protein'. The label indicates 'Plain - Non-Fat' and '19g Protein'.
A clear plastic bag containing several red and yellow apples. The bag is cinched at the top and appears to be tied shut.
A can of Blue Menu Chickpeas. The can is silver with a blue and white label. The label features a bowl of chickpeas and text indicating '4g of fibre NO SALT ADDED'. The volume is 540 mL (19 fl oz).

A can of Blue Menu Pois Chiches (Chickpeas in French). The can is silver with a blue and white label. The label features a bowl of chickpeas and text indicating '4g de fibres SANS SEL AJOUTÉ'. The volume is 540 mL (19 fl oz).
A green and purple box of Milk Chocolate with Roasted Hazelnuts. The brand name appears to be 'Le Contesse'. The box is rectangular and shows an image of a hazelnut and a piece of chocolate.
A bar of milk chocolate with roasted hazelnuts. The packaging is a vertical box with purple and white accents. The brand name 'LISA' is visible at the top. The weight is indicated as 90g.
